LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-19-2022 HEARING RE: MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL AS TO MARTA MORAGA, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER ON THE MANDATORY JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF: THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF SHALL APPEAR VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE FOR HER DEPOSITION WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $688.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-19-2022 - *** CASE IS DISMISSED. *** NO APPEARANCE FOR SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF MARTA ISABEL MORAGA. TODD MASTER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA. THE CASE WAS CALLED AROUND 9:41AM AND THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. MATTER WAS RECALLED AROUND 9:43AM AND THERE WAS STILL NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF EITHER IN PERSON OR VIA COURTCALL. THERE WAS NO RESPONSE IN THE HALLWAY, OUTSIDE OF DEPT. 206, WHEN THE CLERK CALLED OUT PLAINTIFF'S NAME. THE PLAINTIFF ALSO FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. DEFENDANT RENEWS MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND MOVE TO DISMISS THE CASE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT TRIAL. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF MARTA ISABEL MORAGA [TRANSFERRED FROM L&M]
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JENNY LI, Esq. of Ridley Master (Tel: 650-365-7715) for defendant The Regents of the University of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF MARTA ISABEL MORAGA.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is denied without prejudice. Deadline for discovery motions has passed, and there is no pending/concurrent motion to reopen discovery motions. Therefore, the Court has no choice but to deny the motion. Pelton-Shepherd Industries, Inc. v. Delta Packaging Products, Inc., 165 Cal. App. 4th 1568 (2008).

Counsel for defendant may prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR No. 5229, Email: peggytsujimoto@gmail.com, Tel: 415-828-1919 (302/JPT)
